title: Newsletter Delivery Extension
description: Delivery-level extension providing email-specific metrics. Attach as ext.newsletter on delivery reports to supplement standard impressions and clicks with email engagement metrics, client breakdowns, and per-sendout performance.

emails_sent.description: Total number of emails sent in the reporting period

unique_opens.description: Number of unique subscribers who opened the email

total_opens.description: Total open events including repeat opens by the same subscriber

open_rate.description: Unique open rate as a decimal (unique_opens / emails_sent)

click_to_open_rate.description: Click-to-open rate (CTOR) as a decimal — unique clicks divided by unique opens for this reporting period.

bounce_rate.description: Fraction of sent emails that bounced (hard + soft bounces)

unsubscribe_rate.description: Fraction of recipients who unsubscribed after this sendout

spam_complaint_rate.description: Fraction of recipients who marked the email as spam

impressions.description: Ad impressions from subscribers using this client

clicks.description: Ad clicks from subscribers using this client

by_email_client.description: Ad performance breakdown by email client

impressions.description: Ad impressions from subscribers on this device type

clicks.description: Ad clicks from subscribers on this device type

by_reading_device.description: Ad performance breakdown by reading device type

sent_at.description: Actual send time in ISO 8601 format
